subcodes.title: The Last Meeting: Words spoken on 1911-12-01 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: When I arrived in Paris some time ago for the first time, I looked around me with much interest, and in my mind I likened this beautiful city to a large garden.
subcodes.first_line_orig: روزیکه بپاریس آمدم دیدم مزرعه ایست
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation
